sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
targets = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        targets.append((cr, cc))
print(len(targets))
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
targets = []
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        targets.append((cr, cc))
mouse_actions = []
for r, c in targets:
    mouse_actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': r, 'col': c})
action(mouse_actions)
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
